yaml.title: Dr. Jayaruwani Fernando
yaml.subtitle: Senior Lecturer in Agricultural Engineering · Rajarata University of Sri Lanka

markdown.markdown:
![](profile.png){width="200" style="border-radius: 50%; display: block; margin: 0 auto 1.5rem;"}

I am a Senior Lecturer in Agricultural and Biosystems Engineering at Rajarata University of Sri Lanka, specialising in Postharvest Technology and Agricultural Process Engineering. My research applies engineering principles, process optimisation, and emerging digital technologies to improve agricultural processing, storage, and controlled-environment systems — with the broader goal of reducing postharvest losses and supporting sustainable global food security.

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oKLbNdEAAAAJ){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2292-547X){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jayaruwani-fernando-89310a49/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

---


1. Agricultural Machinery Design & Field Mechanization
2. Postharvest Engineering & Thermal Drying Systems
3. Controlled-Environment & Precision Agricultural Systems
4. Agri-industrial Process Optimization
5. Lean Manufacturing & Industrial Engineering

## Current Research Interests

- AI and IoT Integration in Agricultural Engineering
- Digital Twin Modelling for Agricultural Drying & Postharvest Systems

---

## Key Awards & Recognition

**2025** — Outstanding Doctoral Research Award – Gold Medal

**2022** — Vice Chancellor's Award – Most Outstanding Young Researcher, Faculty of Agriculture

**2021** — Certificate and Award of Excellence – First Place in Research, Scholarly & Creative Work, Faculty of Agriculture

**2014** — Teacher Accreditation, Staff and Educational Development Association (SEDA), United Kingdom

---

## Patent

**Granted (2022):** Bund plastering & canal making machine — Patent No. 20513, National Intellectual Property Office of Sri Lanka.

---

[View my complete CV →](cv.html)
